title: Handling encrypted IT equipment and media

group-parts.group: Handling encrypted IT equipment and media
group-parts.name: overview

prose.en: When a user authenticates to the encryption functionality of IT equipment or media, encrypted data is made available. At such a time, the IT equipment or media should be handled according to its original sensitivity or classification. Once the user deauthenticates from the encryption functionality, such as shutting down a device or activating a lock screen, the IT equipment or media can be considered protected by the encryption functionality again.
